ball_event: out Ayush Badoni Run Out!! Lucky breakthrough for RR and it's in the form of a run-out. 147.5kph
event_info: in-seamer; pad-lined; Ayush Badoni misses the glance and the ball rolls to square leg off the thigh pad. There's clearly no run but both batters take off. Mitchell Marsh stops and sends his partner back. There's no way Badoni can make his ground. Ravi Singh; the sub fielder; runs in and scores a direct-hit at the keeper's end to catch him well short of the ground. Replay shows that Marsh called and then turned his back. Ayush Badoni run out (Ravi Singh) 0(1)
